metadata.description: Per-reply engine for B2B outbound: paste one reply/thread/lost-proposal/post, get the next ready-to-send message in the prospect's language.

plugins.name: reply-objection-handler
plugins.description: Classifies ANY single outbound reply (sentiment + objection type), routes it, and writes ONE ready-to-send reply or follow-up. Hot-lead lock & recovery, incumbent/in-house, channel/routing, wrong-person/geo/ICP, dead-data, opt-out, ghost bumps, value-first re-engage, lost-proposal follow-ups, inbound-trigger cold messages. Growing templates repo. Pairs with reply-audit.
